About

Welcome to the math section of my homepage

I may not be writing professional \(\LaTeX\) code, but I have enjoyed experimenting when I wanted to create code fitting the style i wanted.

For this I have combined a listing of (sometimes trivial) \(\LaTeX\)-snippets I found helpful in order to look them up later. (If you have a nice enough editor, you should be able to copy easily without line numbers inbetween.)

Other Files I want to make publicly accessible are to appear below too.

Here you can view my listing of \(\LaTeX\)-snippets I found as solutions for problems I faced: LaTeX-Snippets.pdf

Version: 0.2 - 26 Apr 2026
